meaning: n.做运动的人,肌肉锻练器具
examples: Excellent value for money with this practical pedal exerciser.
It also has an adjustable stem made from a discarded exerciser.
I'm not an active exerciser and my muscle may be not strong enough for such an intense sport.
She advised me, as a frequent exerciser and fairly healthy eater, to continue those activities before she said what I'd feared the most.
But exercising such power can be dangerous to the exerciser - Kumazaki was "promoted" to head a rural prosecutor's office following his successes in Tokyo.
